# IKE Maven Plugin

> Cross-platform Maven plugin providing release, documentation rendering,
> site deployment, and build management goals for IKE projects.
> Workspace goals are in ike-workspace-maven-plugin (ws: prefix).

## Overview

- [IKE Maven Plugin](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-maven-plugin/index.html.md)

## Reports

- [Project Summary](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-maven-plugin/summary.html.md)
- [Project Licenses](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-maven-plugin/licenses.html.md)
- [Project Dependencies](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-maven-plugin/dependencies.html.md)
- [Maven Coordinates](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-maven-plugin/dependency-info.html.md)
- [Project Dependency Management](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-maven-plugin/dependency-management.html.md)
- [Project Plugins](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-maven-plugin/plugins.html.md)
- [Project Plugin Management](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-maven-plugin/plugin-management.html.md)
- [Project Distribution Management](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-maven-plugin/distribution-management.html.md)
- [Project Information](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-maven-plugin/project-info.html.md)
- [Generated Reports](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-maven-plugin/project-reports.html.md)
